name: split-steps
description: Sequential process — phase label + heading on the left, numbered step timeline on the right with a connecting line.
purpose: Use when a multi-step process needs a phase anchor (week N, sprint, milestone) alongside the ordered steps that compose it. Ordered list renders with auto-numbered discs; unordered list uses plain discs.

phase.description: Optional inline-code phase number or label (e.g. '02').

heading.description: Phase heading shown over the watermark phase number.

summary.description: One-sentence summary of what this phase covers.

steps.description: Right-side steps. Use ordered list for numbered discs; lead each with **Title.** then nested body.

skeleton:
<!-- _class: split-steps -->

`02`

## Phase name

One-sentence summary describing what this phase produces.

1. **First step.** What happens and what gets produced.
2. **Second step.** What follows and how it's validated.
3. **Third step.** What closes the phase out.
